meta.description: Story quality evaluation: coherence, fluency, creativity

metrics.name: Coherence
metrics.criteria: The story flows logically. Characters, setting, and events are internally consistent from start to finish.

metrics.name: Fluency
metrics.criteria: The text is grammatically correct, well-formed, and reads naturally as a children's story.

metrics.name: Creativity
metrics.criteria: The story contains imaginative or playful elements that would engage a child reader.
